blocks.content: In this milestone, you explore the services that Instrumentation Hub has automatically discovered in your Kubernetes environment. Services are organized by cluster and namespace, making it easy to find and select specific services for instrumentation.
Click **View & Instrument Services** in the **Application instrumentation** tile.
Expand a cluster to see its namespaces, then click a namespace to see individual services.
Note the instrumentation status of each service: **Not instrumented** (available), **Instrumenting** (in progress), or **Instrumented** (already capturing telemetry).

Discovery happens automatically — Alloy found your services without any manual registration.

In the next milestone, you'll select a service for your first instrumentation.

---

### More to explore (optional)

At this point in your journey, you can explore the following paths:

- [How the knowledge graph processes data](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/knowledge-graph/knowledge-graph-basics/how-knowledge-graph-processes-data/)
- [Configure Kubernetes Monitoring](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/monitor-infrastructure/kubernetes-monitoring/configuration/)
